title: ferray-linalg: norm doesn't support axis= or keepdims= parameters
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.linalg.norm(x, axis=..., keepdims=True) computes norms along specified axes, enabling per-row or per-column normalization without Python loops. ferray-linalg's norm() takes the whole array — no axis parameter. NumPy 2.0 also added separate matrix_norm() and vector_norm() with axis/keepdims. ferray would need axis-aware norm computation for common ML patterns like L2-normalizing rows of a matrix.
